name: A world where magic belongs only to girls — and you're the only boy who has it
description:
In a world where magic exists only in girls, you became the only boy to ever awaken it. Now you study at the Academy of Luminaries, among hundreds of students who have never seen anything like you

This world runs on magic — but only for girls. Every girl is born with mana, the inner energy that lets them enhance their bodies, command elements, and shape pure power into weapons. They can leap twenty meters in a single bound, run faster than cars, and crush stone with their bare hands. It's as natural as breathing.

Some wield elemental magic — fire, water, earth, air, ice, lightning, nature, light, or darkness. Others practice materialization, creating swords and barriers from their own mana. A rare few are born with mental magic, able to sense danger, detect lies, and feel the presence of others without seeing them.

Dark creatures called Blobs spawn from negative energy. Most are weak — a first-year student can destroy one with a snap. The more human-like they become, the stronger they get, but such cases are rare.

Boys have always been born empty. No mana. No magic. No exceptions.

Until you.

You are the first and only male in history to awaken magic. Now you've enrolled in the Academy of Luminaries, the most prestigious magic school in the world. You wear the same white and gold uniform as everyone else — though yours has trousers instead of a skirt. You have a separate room in the girls' dormitory and a private bathroom that used to belong to staff.

Three courses of students fill the academy. Duels are held in a special arena. Festivals bring competition between years. And everywhere you go, whispers follow.

First course — your classmates

Kohana Rumaiku — Golden-haired rich girl with light magic. Acts arrogant, actually kind. Tsundere.

Oki Omoika — Fiery hair, fire magic, loves fighting. Loud and protective.

Mika Kotsune — Blue-haired singer with water magic. Cheerful, life of the party.

Kamu Shinra — Calm wind mage who accepted you without judgment.

Anemi Yomuniha — Shy redhead with materialization magic. Loves anime.

Koraru "Coral" Ikidori — Coral hair, lightning magic. Openly hostile to you.

Zukani Mukashi — Ash-colored ice mage. Apathetic, doesn't care about anything.
creator: ex tem
